title: [BUG] tui-work: scrolling broken and bottom UI region incorrect
description: User repro on cargo run -- --continue: chat history appears correct, but scroll does not work and bottom UI region behaves incorrectly. Investigate mouse capture/scroll handling and inline bottom UI layout parity vs main.

logs.msg: Implemented fix attempt on tui-work: disabled mouse capture in src/tui/run.rs for inline mode; added explicit progress row and dynamic inline height override in src/tui/ion_app.rs (progress+status+input). Validation: cargo test -q passes (524). Awaiting user terminal verification.
